note: Amazon search URLs — these open a search results page, not a specific listing. That way links stay valid even as products go in and out of stock.

components.name: Raspberry Pi 4 Model B (2GB)
components.role: The brain — runs the software and web server
components.replacement_signs: Won't boot after power cycle, service keeps crashing, overheats under normal load
components.notes: 2GB is plenty. 4GB or 8GB also work if that's what's available.

components.name: MicroSD Card (32GB)
components.role: Storage for the OS and sound files
components.replacement_signs: Filesystem errors in logs, Pi fails to boot, read/write errors
components.notes: Look for 'A1' or 'A2' rated cards for better random I/O.

components.name: USB-C Power Supply (5V / 3A+)
components.search_query: raspberry pi 4 official power supply usb c
components.replacement_signs: Lightning bolt icon on screen, random reboots, under-voltage warnings
components.notes: Must supply at least 3A. Cheap phone chargers cause flaky behavior.

components.name: USB Audio Adapter
components.role: Clean audio output to the speaker
components.replacement_signs: No sound, distorted sound, audio device not detected on status page
components.notes: Better sound quality than the Pi's onboard jack.

components.name: Outdoor Weatherproof Speaker
components.replacement_signs: No sound, distorted/crackling, visible water damage, corrosion
components.notes: IP44+ weatherproof rating recommended. Marine-grade lasts longer near water.

components.name: Marine Speaker (alternative)
components.notes: Marine-rated, good for very wet environments.

components.name: Outdoor Speaker Wire (16 AWG, 25 ft)
components.role: Connects Pi audio output to the speaker
components.replacement_signs: Intermittent sound, visible wire damage, corrosion at terminals

components.name: 3.5mm to Bare Wire Adapter
components.role: Bridges the USB audio jack to speaker wire
components.replacement_signs: Sound cuts out when wiggled, visible cable wear
components.notes: Alternative: a small amplifier board with speaker terminals.

components.name: Weatherproof Enclosure (NEMA 4X)
components.role: Houses the Pi, keeps it dry
components.replacement_signs: Cracked, water inside, warped, damaged hinge or gasket
components.notes: Any NEMA 4X or IP65+ junction box in the 8x6x4 inch range works.

components.name: Cable Glands (PG7 / PG9)
components.role: Waterproof cable entry points for the enclosure
components.search_query: waterproof cable gland pg7 pg9 nylon
components.replacement_signs: Water inside enclosure near cable entry, loose grip on cables
components.notes: PG7 for thin cables, PG9 for USB-C power cable.

components.name: Silica Gel Desiccant Packs
components.search_query: indicating silica gel desiccant packs reusable
components.replacement_signs: Packs have turned pink/green (absorbed moisture), visible condensation in box
components.notes: Reusable indicating packs turn color and can be dried in an oven. Check every few months.

components.name: Stainless Steel Mounting Bracket
components.role: Mounts the enclosure to a post or piling
components.search_query: stainless steel l bracket outdoor mounting
components.notes: Stainless steel only — galvanized rusts fast near water.

components.name: PIR Motion Sensor (HC-SR501)
components.replacement_signs: False triggers, never triggers, inconsistent behavior
components.notes: Only needed for motion-trigger mode. Not essential to basic operation.

components.name: Female-to-Female Jumper Wires
components.role: Connects the PIR sensor to the Pi GPIO header (optional)
components.search_query: female to female jumper wires dupont
components.replacement_signs: PIR sensor not responding after wire wiggle test
components.notes: Only needed if using the PIR motion sensor.
